data.body:
## Description

Update the Anti-Patterns table in fix-task-tdd.md to include all 5 cover-up anti-patterns with code examples, rationale, and Do this instead alternatives. Align with the taxonomy in SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md. These are deprecated templates — changes should be minimal (extend existing table).

### Files to modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/fix-task-tdd.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All 5 anti-pattern categories present
  Verify: grep -cE 'Skipping or removing tests|Loosening assertions|Broad exception handlers|Downgrading error severity|Commenting out failing code' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/fix-task-tdd.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Each has Do this instead
  Verify: grep -c 'Do this instead\|Do This Instead' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/fix-task-tdd.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] RED tests now GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_deprecated_fix_task_anti_coverup.py -k 'tdd' --tb=short -q
